$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C27 2026-07-20): RUN witness for Tcl_ObjGetVar2 added to tcl.json -- `Tcl_Obj *Tcl_ObjGetVar2(Tcl_Interp*, Tcl_Obj*, Tcl_Obj*, int)` (tclDecls.h:590), the GET twin of the shipped Tcl_ObjSetVar2 (one fewer param, no newValuePtr). Exported `T Tcl_ObjGetVar2` (nm -D libtcl8.6.so), so eager-import stays safe. Unblocks sqlite src/test_quota.c:16087 `Tcl_ObjGetVar2(p->interp, pVarname, 0, 0)` (test_quota.c -> CLEAN, corpus 37 -> 38). The witness Tcl_Eval("set v 42") stores v=42 inside libtcl, then reads it back through Tcl_ObjGetVar2 (name obj "v", scalar part2=0, flags 0) and extracts 42 via Tcl_GetIntFromObj -> exit 42; stored + retrieved INSIDE libtcl (opaque), value-divergent (a broken binding never yields 42). elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 legs run it (libtcl8.6 installed), native-arm64 arch-gates the run, windows/macos compile-only. Release arm runs the optimizer over the libtcl calls. RED-ON-DISABLE: remove Tcl_ObjGetVar2 from tcl.json -> S0001 -> fails to compile.
